summary: Iteration 30 - Workflow Enforcement & OCR Features Testing Complete. All 17 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified working: (1) Step locking enforcement - cannot advance to Step N+1 until Step N is completed, (2) Document requirement enforcement - checks mandatory docs when completing steps, (3) Step-status API returns correct lock/unlock/can_complete per step, (4) Case-document-check API returns completeness based on workflow-defined documents, (5) Request-info-sheet API allows case manager to specify required fields, (6) Information-sheet API returns required_fields and completion percentage, (7) Extract-resume-to-infosheet OCR endpoint working, (8) Client Dashboard shows lock icons, completion badges, required fields highlighting, (9) Case Manager Dashboard shows step management with lock indicators and Request Info Sheet button.
critical_code_review_comments: Step locking logic in /api/cases/update-step correctly enforces sequential completion
Document requirement check uses workflow_steps collection for required_documents definition
Step-status API at /api/ai-intel/step-status uses case_steps for lock logic and workflow_steps for document requirements
Email service is MOCKED - logs to email_logs collection instead of sending real emails
AI/LLM calls use GPT-5.2 via emergentintegrations with EMERGENT_LLM_KEY
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 30 verified all new workflow enforcement and OCR features: (1) POST /api/cases/update-step - Step locking enforcement works correctly, returns 400 with 'previous step not completed' message when trying to update locked step, (2) POST /api/cases/update-step - Document requirement enforcement checks mandatory docs from workflow_steps when marking step as completed, (3) GET /api/ai-intel/step-status/{case_id} - Returns steps array with is_locked, can_complete, required_documents, all_docs_uploaded, previous_completed fields, (4) GET /api/ai-intel/case-document-check/{case_id} - Returns completeness_percentage, missing_documents, steps with document status, (5) POST /api/cases/{case_id}/request-info-sheet - Case manager can specify required_fields array, creates notification for client, (6) GET /api/cases/{case_id}/information-sheet - Returns required_fields, completion object with percentage/filled_count/missing_fields, (7) POST /api/ai-intel/extract-resume-to-infosheet/{case_id}?document_id={doc_id} - OCR extracts data from document and auto-fills info sheet. Frontend: Client Dashboard shows Approval Prediction card (45% shown with risk level and recommendations), Document Check card (100% completeness), Workflow Steps tab with completed/in-progress badges and required documents per step, My Info tab with completion bar and required field highlighting. Case Manager Dashboard shows step management with lock icons, 'Complete previous step first' messages, Request Info Sheet button, Information Sheet button.

backend_endpoints.get_cases: PASS - GET /api/cases/my-cases returns enriched data with steps
backend_endpoints.step_status: PASS - GET /api/ai-intel/step-status/{case_id} returns lock info per step
backend_endpoints.step_locking: PASS - POST /api/cases/update-step returns 400 for locked steps

frontend_features.client_dashboard: PASS - Shows case overview, AI insights, workflow steps, info sheet
frontend_features.approval_prediction: PASS - Shows 45% probability, MEDIUM risk, recommended actions
frontend_features.document_check: PASS - Shows 100% completeness, 'All documents uploaded!' message
frontend_features.workflow_steps_tab: PASS - Shows completed/in-progress badges, required documents per step
frontend_features.info_sheet_tab: PASS - Shows completion bar (33%), required fields with red asterisks, Upload Resume button
frontend_features.case_manager_dashboard: PASS - Shows cases list, case details with workflow steps
frontend_features.cm_step_management: PASS - Shows lock icons, 'Complete previous step first' messages
frontend_features.cm_info_sheet_buttons: PASS - Information Sheet and Request Info Sheet buttons visible

mocked_services.email_service: MOCKED - send_email logs to email_logs collection instead of sending real emails
